user.title: Configure AGSHome Alarm Hub
user.description:
Enter the local Tuya connection parameters for your AGSHome hub.

See the README to retrieve the Device ID and Local Key from the Tuya IoT portal.

data_description.host: Local IP address of your hub (e.g. 192.168.1.xx). Assign a static IP in your router.
data_description.device_id: Unique device identifier on the Tuya IoT platform (iot.tuya.com)
data_description.local_key: Local encryption key retrieved from iot.tuya.com
data_description.protocol_version: Try 3.3 first, then 3.4 if the connection fails

camera.title: AGSHome Camera (optional)
camera.description:
If you have an AGSHome WiFi camera, enter its parameters here.

Leave empty to skip.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the AGSHome hub. Check IP, Device ID, Local Key and ensure the hub is reachable on your local network.
error.cannot_connect_camera: Unable to connect to the camera. Check its parameters or leave the fields empty to skip.

abort.already_configured: This AGSHome hub is already configured.
